titlStmt.titl: Mortality and Causes of Death from Death Notification 1997-2005

verStmt.version: v1: Edited, anonymised data for public distribution

stdyInfo.abstract: The National Household Travel Survey 2020 is the third round of the survey series designed to assess domestic transport and tourism travel patterns of South African households as well as their attitudes about transport.

sumDscr.geogUnit: The lowest level of geographic aggregation covered by the data is District Municipality
sumDscr.universe: The target population of the survey consists of all private households in all nine provinces of South Africa and residents in workers' hostels. The survey does not cover other collective living quarters such as students' hostels, old-age homes, hospitals, prisons and military barracks.

stdyInfo.notes: Household: household characteristics, socio-economic circumstances of households. Individual: demographic information (sex, age, race), domestic transport and tourism travel patterns, and attitudes concerning transport

useStmt.citReq: Statistics South Africa. National Household Travel Survey 2020 [dataset]. Version 1. Pretoria: Statistics South Africa [producer], 2021. Cape Town: DataFirst [distributor], 2021. DOI: https://doi.org/10.25828/NRVJ-1663
useStmt.conditions: Public access data, available to all

var.name: Uqno
var.labl: Unique household number

var.name: Psuno_seg
var.labl: Primary Sampling Unit (PSU) and Segment Number

var.name: Taz_exp
var.labl: Travel Analysis Zones (TAZs)

var.name: Stratum
var.labl: Stratum

var.name: Metro_code
var.labl: Metropolitan municipality

var.name: District_code
var.labl: District municipality

var.name: Pr_code
var.labl: Province

var.name: Geo_type
var.labl: Geography type

catgry.labl: Rural: Tribal or Traditional area an Farms

var.name: Uqno
var.labl: Unique household number

var.name: TravelDay
var.labl: Travel day

var.name: Head_sex
var.labl: Sex of the head of household

var.name: Head_age
var.labl: Age of the head of household

var.name: Head_population
var.labl: Population group of the head of household

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__1
var.labl: Sources of income: Salaries and wages

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__2
var.labl: Sources of income: Net profit from business or professional practice/Activities

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__3
var.labl: Sources of income: Income from subsistence farming

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__4
var.labl: Sources of income: Income from letting of fixed property

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__5
var.labl: Sources of income: Regular payments from pension fund from previous employment a

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__6
var.labl: Sources of income: Social grants (including old age grant)

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__7
var.labl: Sources of income: Maintenance, spousal support and similar allowances from divo

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__8
var.labl: Sources of income: Regular allowance/Remittances received from non-household mem

var.name: Q71IncomeSo__9
var.labl: Sources of income: Other income (e.g. Royalties, Interest, Dividends on shares,

var.name: Q72IncomeMa
var.labl: Main source of income

catgry.labl: Net profit from business or professional practice/activities of commercial farming
Income from letting of fixed property
Regular payments from pension fund from previous employment and pension fund from annuity funds
Maintenance, spousal support and similar allowances from divorced spouse, family members, etc., living elsewhere
Regular allowance/ remittances received from non-household members
Other income (e.g royalties, interest, dividends on shares, income from share trading)

var.name: Q721Remitances
var.labl: Income from remittances

var.name: Q722Pensions
var.labl: Income from pensions or retirement

var.name: Q73IncomeTo
var.labl: Total household income (Categories)

var.name: Q741Net_HH
var.labl: Minimum amount household survive on

var.name: Q75TotExpenditure
var.labl: Total household expenditure

var.name: Q751PubTranExp
var.labl: Total expenditure on public transport

var.name: Q751aWorkexp
var.labl: Total expenditure on public transport for work

var.name: Q751bEduExp
var.labl: Total expenditure on public transport for education

var.name: Q76aTransUse__1
var.labl: Household access to motor vehicle: Motorcycles/Scooters

var.name: Q76aTransUse__2
var.labl: Household access to motor vehicle: Car/Bakkie/Station wagon/4x4 owned by employe

var.labl: Household access to motor vehicle: Car/Bakkie/Station wagon/4x4 owned by the hou

var.name: Q76aTransUse__6
var.labl: Household access to motor vehicle: Trucks

var.name: Q76aTransUse__7
var.labl: Household access to motor vehicle: Other

var.name: Q76a1ScooterNo
var.labl: Number of Motorcycles/Scooters for private use

var.name: Q76a2CarNoEmply
var.labl: Number of Car/Bakkie/Station wagon/4x4 owned by employer/Company for private use

var.name: Q76a3NoCarFr
var.labl: Number of Car/Bakkie/Station wagon/4x4 owned by the household for private use

var.name: Q76a4NoCarHh
var.labl: Number of Car/Bakkie/Station wagon/4x4 owned by relatives/Friends for private us

var.name: Q76a5NoMbus
var.labl: Number of Minibus/Kombis for private use

var.name: Q76a6NoTruck
var.labl: Number of Trucks for private use

var.name: Q76bTransUse__1
var.labl: Access to non-motorised vehicles: Bicycles

var.name: Q76bTransUse__2
var.labl: Access to non-motorised vehicles: Animal-drawn vehicles

var.name: Q76bTransUse__3
var.labl: Access to non-motorised vehicles: Animals that pull animal-drawn vehicles e.g. H

var.name: Q76bTransUse__4
var.labl: Access to non-motorised vehicles: Other

var.name: Q76b1BycNo
var.labl: Number of bicycles owned

var.name: Q76b2NoAnimalD
var.labl: Number of animal-drawn vehicles owned

var.name: Q76b3Otr_MotorVh
var.labl: How many animals that can pull animal-drawn vehicles

var.name: Q771aGroceryShp
var.labl: Transport to nearest food or grocery shop

catgry.labl: Long distance train (e.g. Shosholoza Blue Train)
Long distance bus (e.g. Intercape Translux etc)
App/Web based/Call on demand (e.g. Uber, Taxify etc)
Special transit for people with disabilities (Dial a Ride)
Car/Bakkie passenger through a lift club

var.labl: Transport problems experienced by household: Poor condition of roads

var.name: Q83TransPrblm__20

var.name: Q83TransPrblm__22
var.labl: Transport problems experienced by household: Congestion

var.name: Q83TransPrblm__23

var.name: Q83TransPrblm__24

var.labl: Reasons for not using a train service: Prefer private transport

var.name: Total_hh_grant
var.labl: Total household grant

var.name: Total_hh_monthly_sal
var.labl: Total household monthly salary

var.name: Total_hh_income
var.labl: Total household income

var.name: Mainmode_eight
var.labl: Main mode used by households

catgry.labl: Long distance train (e.g. Shosholoza, Blue Train)
Long distance bus (e.g. Intercape, Translux, etc.)
Special transit for people with disabilities (Dial a Ride)

var.name: Q2DweType
var.labl: Type of main dwelling that the household occupies

catgry.labl: Dwelling/House or brick/Concrete block structure on a separate stand or yard or farm
Traditional dwelling hut/Structure made of traditional materials
Flat of apartment in a block of flats
Informal dwelling/Shack not in backyard (e.g. in an informal/squatter settlement or on farm
Room/Flat on a property or a larger dwelling/ servants' quarters/granny flat

var.name: Q3Dwelling
var.labl: Type of living quarters

var.name: Q4MainDwelling
var.labl: Type of the main dwelling

var.name: Hsize
var.labl: Household size

var.name: Weight
var.labl: Household weight

var.name: Uqno
var.labl: Unique household number

var.name: Personno
var.labl: Person number

var.name: Person_ID
var.labl: Person identifier

var.name: Sex
var.labl: Gender

var.name: Age
var.labl: Age in completed years

var.name: Population
var.labl: Population group

var.name: Placeofbirth
var.labl: Place of birth

var.name: Migration
var.labl: Migration

var.name: Nationality
var.labl: Nationality

var.name: Reltohead
var.labl: Relationship to the head of household

catgry.labl: Other relative (e.g. in-laws or aunt/uncle) of person 01

var.name: Maritalstatus
var.labl: Marital status

catgry.labl: Living together like husband and wife
Single, but have been living together with someone as husband/wife before

var.name: Education
var.labl: Highest level of education

catgry.labl: Higher/National/Advanced Certificate with Grade 12/Std 10/Occupational Certificate-NQF Level 5
Post Higher Diploma (Masters Diploma and Master’s Degree)-NQF Level 9
Bachelor’s Degree and post/ Occupational Certificate-NQF Level 7
Doctoral Degrees (Doctoral Diploma and PhD)-NQF Level 10

var.name: Attedu
var.labl: Educational institution attendance

var.name: Eduinst
var.labl: Type of educational institution

catgry.labl: Pre-school (including ECD centre, e.g. day care, crèche, play group, nursery school, or pre-primary school)
School (including Grade R to Grade 12 leaners who attend a formal school)
Adult Education and Training Learning Centre (ABET/AET Centre)
Technical and Vocational Education and Training (TVET) college
Other than any of the above

var.name: Ppriv
var.labl: Nature of educational institution (Public/private)

var.name: Stdymeth
var.labl: Study method

catgry.labl: Distance learning e.g. Unisa, attending via internet

var.name: Havelicence
var.labl: Have drivers licence

var.name: Licencetype__1
var.labl: Type of licence: Motorcycle

var.name: Licencetype__2
var.labl: Type of licence: Car

var.name: Licencetype__3
var.labl: Type of licence: Heavy vehicle

var.name: Licencetype__4
var.labl: Type of licence: Do not know

var.name: Q11aSee
var.labl: Seeing (even with glasses if he/she wears them)

var.name: Q11bHear
var.labl: Hearing (even with a hearing aid, if he/she wears one)

var.name: Q11cWalk
var.labl: Walking a kilometre or climbing a flight of steps

var.name: Q11dMemory
var.labl: Remembering and concentrating

var.name: Q11eCare
var.labl: With self-care, such as washing or dressing

var.name: Q11fComm
var.labl: In communicating in his/her usual language including sign language

NW - Ngaka Modiri Molema District Municipality
